title: Kraken wraps the target on hit

card.rawText: When this creature hits, the targeted creature is wrapped. During your opponent's turn they must roll 1 die. If the result is 3-5, they are freed, otherwise they receive 10 damage.

plan.title: Kraken wraps the target on hit
plan.summary: Kraken hits the opponent primary creature and applies the Wrapped status to that target.

notes: Force the opening hit to land; this fixture covers only the on-hit Wrapped status, not the later 3-5 escape roll.

manualVerification: Confirm 068-E02 separately frees the wrapped creature on 3-5 and deals 10 damage otherwise.
riskNotes: This fixture validates the on-hit status application only.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Kraken's Wrapped status on hit.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
